validation_context.purpose: Validate R13/R14/R15 mechanical enforcement after spec hardening
validation_context.baseline: plan-standalone-test-1 (exposed DEEP-1..DEEP-7 defects via spec invent)
validation_context.key_baseline_defect_example: plan-standalone-test-1-decide.md:26 emitted `intent_card_id: "PENDING-emberdeck-unavailable"` — a placeholder that R13 now bans

rules_under_test.R13: UNVERIFIED Tag — mechanical enforcement (placeholder ban, field omission, invent-prone whitelist)
rules_under_test.R14: Fail-Loud over Invent-Silent (halt/escalate on spec hole; allowed degrade only for emberdeck/firebat/pyreez absence)
rules_under_test.R15: Boundary Mechanical Detection (Ground=raw facts only, Investigate=no future paths/design verbs, Decide=no fact-capture verbs)

ground.conflicts_style: raw-quote-only (e.g. 'A says X. B says Y.' no comparative verbs)

volatile_state.git: success; head 778eca4...b571 stable across capture window

investigate.source_version_fields: all OMITTED per R13 (ed_snapshot_version, rules_version, contracts_version)

decide.mode_resolution_basis: declared_default + R6 mechanical: affected_files_count=4 (<5) + has_architecture_level=false → no Plan/Design force; declared=design governs
decide.chosen_option: C — diagram-anchored portal doc with deep-links
decide.intent_card_id_field: OMITTED with explicit reason line `emberdeck_status: absent (intent_card_id field omitted per R12 degrade policy + R13 placeholder ban)`

plan.risk_coverage_map: 10 rows; every RS-1..RS-10 mapped to ≥1 policy AND ≥1 requirement
plan.downstream_chain: Spec → Report → Verify → Reflect (Implement/Test skipped per plan-standalone)
plan.volatile_state_disclosure: all 5 dimensions surfaced; .step-status flagged stale (points at plan-standalone-test-1)

themes: Field omission over placeholder emission (R13 invariant)
Substitute provenance via filesystem sha256+mtime when ED graph unavailable
Closure traceability — every risk bound to policy AND requirement
R6 mechanical evaluation recorded as explicit based_on/r6_evaluation block
Ground conflicts surface, Investigate adjudicates (clean handoff)
Degrade-policy chain propagates emberdeck-absence through all 4 artifacts uniformly
surprises: R12 degrade absorbed three simultaneous MCP absences (emberdeck + firebat + pyreez) without forcing the flow to BLOCKED
The 9-vs-10 ambiguity (steps/ dir has 10 entries; docs say 9 + 1 classifier) was *resolved* by in-repo cross-citation rather than escalated as needs_clarification

pass_3_prior_comparison.flow_history_dir_state: .blazewrit/flow-history/ was empty before this entry — this is the first canonical history record

test_1_vs_test_2.test_2_intent_card_id: FIELD OMITTED with explicit emberdeck_status: absent reason line (R13 compliant)
test_1_vs_test_2.test_1_ed_snapshot_version: explicit value or placeholder pattern observed in baseline
test_1_vs_test_2.test_2_ed_snapshot_version: FIELD OMITTED, surfaced via ground.unknowns[ed_query] (R12/R13 compliant)
test_1_vs_test_2.test_2_conflicts_style: raw quote rows only — `WORKFLOW_PLAN.md:31 says ...`; `Bash ls says ...` — no comparative verbs (R15 boundary clean)
test_1_vs_test_2.test_1_R6_basis: based_on/mode_force_basis with affected_files_count=22 (Plan force ≥5) overridden by declared=design
test_1_vs_test_2.test_2_R6_basis: based_on/r6_evaluation with affected_files_count=4 (<5) and has_architecture_level=false — no force; declared=design governs cleanly
test_1_vs_test_2.improvement_summary: test-2 eliminates the placeholder-emission pattern that DEEP-1..DEEP-7 surfaced in test-1; substitute provenance is now structurally encoded rather than rule-only

pass_3_prior_comparison.prior_patterns_confirmed_or_contradicted: n/a — no prior flow-history; first-record baseline established

what_worked: R13 placeholder ban — every invent-prone field (intent_card_id, ed_snapshot_version, rules_version, contracts_version) was *omitted* with a one-line reason rather than emitting `PENDING-*` / `TBD` / `not_tracked` strings. Visible at: ground:freshness, investigate:compatibility_verdict.source_version, decide:frontmatter+based_on, plan:Source-Pedigree.

R14 fail-loud surfacing — emberdeck/firebat/pyreez absence each got its own row in `ground.unknowns` with `verified: true` (the unknown itself is verified, the missing data is not invented). Downstream consumers can branch on these rows explicitly.

R15 boundary cleanliness — Ground.conflicts uses pure raw quotes (`source A says "X". source B says "Y".`) with no comparative verbs; Investigate avoided option/design verbs in risk_surface (used descriptive 'Description treats X as Y' framing); Decide kept fact-capture verbs out of options_deliberated/chosen_architecture.

R6 explicit-evaluation block — Decide records `affected_files_count=4 (< 5) → no Plan force` and `has_architecture_level=false → no Design force` and `declared_default=design governs`. Mechanical reproducibility achieved.

Substitute provenance — per-file sha256+mtime block in `ground.verification_proof.read_files` (17 rows) serves as a deterministic fallback for the missing ED snapshot id. Downstream artifacts cite this block by name.
Risk-coverage map closure — Plan synthesizes Decide+Investigate by binding every RS-1..RS-10 to ≥1 policy AND ≥1 requirement in a single table. Full traceability surface.

Hard counts honored — 16 flow definitions, 16 agent files, 10 directories, 9 steps + 1 classifier all enumerated by `Bash ls` and carried verbatim through to Decide policies P3/P6 and REQ-2/REQ-4/REQ-5.
Triage 9-vs-10 reconciliation — resolved in-flow by Investigate citing AGENTS.md:9 + WORKFLOW_PLAN.md:21, without escalating to needs_clarification.

Volatile-state honesty — tests=skipped-with-reason and lint=skipped-with-reason were preserved as explicit non-green states all the way to Plan.Volatile-State-Disclosure; no implicit 'green CI' inference.
what_failed: `.blazewrit/.step-status` is stale — still points at `plan-standalone-test-1` while this flow is `plan-standalone-test-2`. Surfaced as Ground.conflicts row 3 and Plan.Volatile-State-Disclosure, but the orchestrator marker itself was not updated. Not a flow failure but a harness gap.

`CHANGELOG.md` was not stat'd this session (ground.unknowns[changelog_freshness].verified=false). Propagated as RS-9 → P9 → REQ-11, but the underlying gap (incomplete freshness sweep) remains and shifts cost downstream.

Test/lint configuration absence is unresolved — Ground surfaces `test_suite_definition` and `lint_definition` as unknowns; Investigate marks them `out_of_scope` for this doc task. The structural question (is missing config intentional?) is deferred indefinitely.
`orchestrator_installed_provenance` unknown persists — sha256 byte-identity established but install mechanism (manual copy vs tsc/install) not determined. Carried as RS-3 → REQ-7 (disclosure-only).
unexpected: Triple-MCP absence absorbed cleanly — emberdeck + firebat + pyreez all absent simultaneously, yet R12 degrade allowed the flow to complete without BLOCKED. The graceful-degrade contract scales to multi-tool unavailability.

9-vs-10 step-pool ambiguity was resolved by in-repo cross-reference, not escalated. AGENTS.md:9 + WORKFLOW_PLAN.md:21 contain the adjudication; Investigate.ground_unknowns_addressed marked it `resolved`, avoiding unnecessary user round-trip.

Plan's Risk-Coverage-Map table emerged as a powerful closure-trace pattern — binding every Investigate RS to both a Decide policy AND a Decide requirement gives a single auditable table for verify completeness.

Doc-only task is unusually well-suited to ED-absent operation — the referents *are* filesystem documents, so sha256+mtime substitute provenance has minimal information loss compared to a true graph traversal. Different task profiles may not be so forgiving.

The R6 evaluation block in Decide is essentially mechanical — declared_default + affected_files_count + has_architecture_level fully determine mode. The 'option deliberation' is real but the mode itself is not deliberated.

patterns_discovered.name: Decide records R6 force-evaluation as a named based_on block
evidence: decide.based_on: `has_architecture_level: false → no Design force from R6; declared_default design governs; affected_files_count: 4 (< 5) → no Plan force from R6`

patterns_discovered.name: Ground.conflicts uses raw-quote rows; reconciliation deferred to Investigate.ground_unknowns_addressed
evidence: ground.conflicts boundary note `Raw quotes only — no comparative judgment is rendered in this section (Ground boundary R15)`

patterns_discovered.name: R12 degrade absorbs simultaneous emberdeck + firebat + pyreez absence
evidence: ground.unknowns rows: ed_query, ed_snapshot_version, firebat_baseline, pyreez_baseline

patterns_discovered.name: .blazewrit/.step-status lags behind active flow_id; flagged but not auto-updated
evidence: ground.conflicts row 3: marker points at plan-standalone-test-1 while flow_id is plan-standalone-test-2
patterns_discovered.remediation_hint: Orchestrator should write .step-status atomically at flow start (not only on DONE)

validation_verdict.R13_mechanical_enforcement: PASS — every invent-prone field surveyed (intent_card_id, ed_snapshot_version, rules_version, contracts_version) is OMITTED with an explicit reason line across all 4 artifacts; zero placeholder strings of the banned form found
validation_verdict.R14_fail_loud: PASS — MCP absences (emberdeck, firebat, pyreez) surfaced via ground.unknowns rows with verified:true on the unknown row; no invent-silent substitution observed
validation_verdict.R15_boundary: PASS — Ground.conflicts uses raw quotes only (explicit boundary note line 109); Investigate avoids option/design/future-path verbs in constraint/risk surfaces; Decide.chosen_architecture restricts itself to artifact structure (explicit boundary note line 76: `does not re-derive facts`)
validation_verdict.comparison_to_test_1: Improvement confirmed — the specific defect class that test-1 exposed (e.g. `intent_card_id: "PENDING-emberdeck-unavailable"`) is mechanically prevented in test-2 by R13 field-omission + R14 fail-loud + R15 boundary checks

tier_2_decision_notes: No pattern has crossed the 3-occurrences-across-flows threshold yet (this is the first flow recorded). All 7 patterns remain in Tier 1 (raw) until additional flows confirm recurrence. Searched .claude/rules/ — directory does not exist, so no existing rule files to dedup against.
tier_3_clauseMd_changes: None proposed. Tier 3 promotion requires explicit user permission per Reflect agent contract.
